description_long: This is a double bed with a sturdy wooden frame and a prominent headboard and footboard, both upholstered in a light beige fabric. The bed is neatly made with two large, square pillows and a thick comforter, both in a muted olive green color, complemented by a beige top cover. The bedding appears plush and inviting, with the comforter and pillows slightly overhanging the sides of the bed. The frame sits low to the ground, supported by short, dark legs that are barely visible beneath the bedding. The overall design is modern yet cozy, suitable for a contemporary urban bedroom. The materials and color palette give the bed a warm, natural aesthetic.
description: A modern double bed with a wooden frame, upholstered headboard and footboard, and plush olive green and beige bedding. The bed exudes a cozy, contemporary feel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the headboard, two large pillows, and the layered bedding with beige and olive green colors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the bedding and the depth of the headboard and frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the upholstered footboard and the back of the headboard.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the bed, the arrangement of pillows, and the layered bedding.
